question: what is KYC know your customer verification
answer:
KYC stands for Know Your Customer — it is a mandatory identity verification process required by financial regulators to prevent fraud, money laundering, and underage gambling.

At SiDOBet, KYC requires you to submit:
• A valid government-issued photo ID (passport, national ID, or driving licence)
• A recent proof of address (utility bill or bank statement, dated within 3 months)

Verification is required before your first withdrawal. Once approved, you have full access to all platform features. The process typically takes 24–48 hours.

question: why is my withdrawal pending
answer: Withdrawals are reviewed for security before processing. Most withdrawals complete within 1–3 business days. If yours has been pending longer, please contact support with your payment ID.

question: how long does a withdrawal take
answer: Withdrawal times depend on your chosen method. E-wallets typically take 24 hours. Bank transfers take 3–5 business days. Crypto withdrawals usually complete within a few hours.

question: my deposit did not go through
answer: If your deposit has not been credited, please allow up to 30 minutes for processing. If still not received, contact your bank to confirm the transaction completed. If it did, send us the transaction reference and we will investigate.

question: what payment methods are accepted
answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, local bank transfers, and regional e-wallets including GoPay and OVO (Indonesia), GCash (Philippines), PromptPay (Thailand), and ViettelPay (Vietnam). Cryptocurrency deposits are also supported. Available methods depend on your country of registration.

question: what is the minimum withdrawal amount
answer: The minimum withdrawal amount is the minimum amount for your currency for most payment methods. Crypto withdrawals may have different minimums depending on network fees.

question: why was my withdrawal rejected
answer: Withdrawals may be declined if your account verification is incomplete, active bonus wagering requirements have not been met, or your payment method does not match your deposit method.

question: can I withdraw to a different method than I deposited with
answer: For security and compliance reasons, withdrawals must be processed back to the same method used for your original deposit where possible. This is a standard anti-money laundering requirement.

question: how long does KYC verification take
answer: Identity verification typically takes between 24 and 48 hours. During busy periods it may take up to 72 hours. You will receive an email confirmation once your account has been verified.

question: what documents are needed for verification
answer: We require a valid government-issued photo ID such as a passport, national ID, or driving licence. A proof of address such as a recent utility bill or bank statement dated within 3 months is also required.

question: my verification was rejected
answer: Verification rejections are typically caused by blurry documents, expired ID, or documents where details do not match your registration information. Please resubmit clear, current documents.

question: do I need to verify before I can withdraw
answer: Yes. Full identity verification is required before your first withdrawal. This is a legal requirement under anti-money laundering regulations. Deposits are permitted before verification is complete.

question: why is my account locked
answer: Accounts may be locked due to multiple failed login attempts, suspicious activity detected on your account, or a compliance review. Please contact support to resolve this.

question: how do I reset my password
answer: Click Forgot Password on the login page and enter your registered email address. You will receive a reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if you do not see it.

question: how do I update my personal details
answer: You can update your email address, phone number, and address in the Account Settings section. For legal name changes, please contact support with supporting documentation.

question: how do I close my account
answer: To permanently close your account, please contact our support team. Any remaining balance will be processed as a withdrawal before closure. Note that account closure is a responsible gaming option we take seriously.

question: what is rollover or wagering requirement
answer: A wagering requirement means you must bet the bonus amount a specified number of times before you can withdraw winnings. For example, a $100 bonus with a 20x requirement means you must wager $2,000 total.

question: why did my bonus expire
answer: Bonuses have an expiry period stated in the promotion terms. If the wagering requirement is not completed within this time, the bonus and any associated winnings are forfeited.

question: can I use multiple bonuses at the same time
answer: In most cases, only one bonus can be active at a time. Please check the specific promotion terms. Stacking bonuses is generally not permitted.

question: why am I not eligible for the welcome bonus
answer: The welcome bonus is available to new players on their first deposit only. If your account already had a previous deposit or bonus, you may no longer qualify. Eligibility also depends on your country of residence.

question: do free spins have wagering requirements
answer: Free spin winnings usually carry a wagering requirement, commonly between 20x and 40x. The specific terms are stated in each promotion. Some free spin offers are wager-free.

question: how do I set a deposit limit
answer: You can set daily, weekly, or monthly deposit limits in your Responsible Gaming settings under Account. Limits take effect immediately when reducing and may have a cooling-off period when increasing.

question: how do I take a break from gambling
answer: You can set a cooling-off period of 24 hours, 7 days, or 30 days in your Responsible Gaming settings. During this period you will not be able to log in or place bets.

question: how do I self-exclude
answer: Self-exclusion is available in your Responsible Gaming settings. You can choose a period of 6 months, 1 year, 3 years, or permanent. This cannot be reversed during the exclusion period.

question: what responsible gaming tools are available
answer: We offer deposit limits, loss limits, session time limits, cooling-off periods, and self-exclusion. You can also access your full gaming history to review your activity at any time.

question: I think someone accessed my account
answer: If you suspect unauthorised access, please change your password immediately and contact our security team. We will review recent login activity on your account and take appropriate action.

question: how do I enable two-factor authentication
answer: Two-factor authentication can be enabled in your Security Settings. We support authenticator apps and SMS verification. We strongly recommend enabling this for account protection.

question: what currencies are supported
answer: We support SGD, USD, EUR, GBP, AUD, and several other major currencies. Cryptocurrency accounts are denominated in the relevant coin. Currency conversion fees may apply.

question: how do I contact customer support
answer: Our support team is available 24/7 via live chat, email at support@playsafe.com, and phone during business hours. Live chat is the fastest option for urgent issues.

question: is my personal data safe
answer: We use industry-standard 256-bit SSL encryption to protect all data transmissions. Your personal data is handled in accordance with applicable local data protection regulations (PDPA, PDPB, and equivalent) regulations and is never sold to third parties.

question: what age do I need to be to register
answer: You must be at least 21 years old to register and play. We perform age verification as part of our KYC process. Underage gambling is prohibited and accounts found to be in violation will be closed.

question: what happens to my bonus if I change my payment method
answer: Changing your payment method does not affect active bonuses. Your bonus balance and wagering progress are linked to your account, not your payment method. You can freely update or change your payment methods without losing any bonus funds or progress.

question: can I play from a different country while travelling abroad
answer: You can generally access your account while travelling, however some countries are restricted due to licensing and regulatory requirements. If you are unable to access the platform from your travel destination, this is due to geo-restrictions in that jurisdiction. Please contact support before travelling if you are unsure whether your destination is restricted.

question: why was my deposit declined or failed
answer:
Deposits can be declined for several reasons:
• Insufficient funds in your bank account or card
• Your bank blocking online gambling transactions (contact your bank to allow)
• Incorrect card details entered
• 3D Secure verification not completed
• Daily or monthly deposit limit reached on your account

If the problem persists, try a different payment method or contact our support team for assistance.

question: can I have multiple accounts or register twice
answer: No. Each player is permitted one account only. Creating multiple accounts is a violation of our Terms and Conditions and may result in all accounts being permanently closed and any winnings forfeited. If you have lost access to your account, please contact support to recover it rather than registering again.

question: what is a wagering requirement rollover playthrough
answer: A wagering requirement (also called rollover or playthrough) is the number of times you must bet your bonus amount before you can withdraw winnings from it. For example, a $100 bonus with a 20x wagering requirement means you must place $2,000 in bets before withdrawing. Different games contribute differently — slots typically count 100%, while table games may count less. Check the specific bonus terms for full details.
